title: BECx Air Leakage Performance Test — Building Enclosure
acceptance_criteria: Whole-building air leakage rate must not exceed 0.25 CFM/ft² at 75 Pa pressure differential per ASTM E2357. Individual test areas must not exceed 0.15 CFM/ft² at 75 Pa. Any localized leakage exceeding threshold requires remediation and retest.
documentation_required: ASTM E2357 test report with pressure and flow data
Thermographic survey images identifying leakage paths
Remediation log for any failed areas
notes: Test to be conducted after air barrier installation is complete and before cladding installation conceals the air barrier system. Weather conditions must permit pressurization: wind speed below 15 mph, no active precipitation.
